title: Uragoga subherbacea
taxonomy: Uragoga subherbacea is classified in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is a species of flowering plant. Uragoga subherbacea is native to tropical Africa. It belongs to the genus Uragoga, which is part of the Apocynaceae family. The classification of Uragoga subherbacea is based on its botanical characteristics and morphological features.
